name: chain__triggering_events_nobody_tracks_leade
method: triggering events nobody tracks:- leadership change (theorg)- office move (google alerts + address)- bad glassdoor reviews spike (means problems = budget)- competitor layoffs (linkedin)- job posting

stages.task: Scrape 6 trigger sources in parallel (TheOrg, Glassdoor, LinkedIn, job boards, SEC EDGAR, Google Alerts)
Score each company 1-10 by signal density (multiple triggers = higher score), filter <5, enrich with contact info
Generate personalized cold email using trigger event as hook (procedural memory: mention specific trigger + 6-question framework), feed to eas_lead_pipeline
